reason: The merged marker workflow accepted reruns with a fresh workspace ledger and did not prove the marker commit was the only commit in the push. The one-time authorization is consumed and must not remain as an active repository trigger.

historical_run_boundary.status: not discoverable through available connector run-list actions
historical_run_boundary.residual_risk: A historical workflow rerun may use the workflow definition from its original commit. Repository deletion prevents new marker-triggered executions but does not prove the platform has disabled rerun of the historical run.
historical_run_boundary.required_settings_action: Disable the One-Time V1 AAA Spatial Pack Marker workflow or remove/rotate its paid environment provider secret at the GitHub Actions settings layer, then preserve redacted evidence.

status: REPOSITORY TRIGGER REMOVED — HISTORICAL RERUN SETTINGS EVIDENCE STILL REQUIRED
rollback: Revert only if a new separately reviewed and explicitly authorized paid execution design provides an atomic one-time consumption ledger and blocks run attempts greater than one.
